Klasse Ray

java.lang.Object
raytracer.Ray
public class Ray extends Object
Represents a ray in 3D-space. It consists of an origin and a direction. In the context of raytracing it is used to calculate intersection points.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung

    Methode

    • origin

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Ray

      public Ray(Vector3d origin, Vector3d direction)
      Creates a new ray with an origin and a direction.
      Parameter:
      origin - the origin of the ray.
      direction - the direction of the ray.

  • Methodendetails

    • at

      public Vector3d at(double t)
      Calculates a 3D point along the ray with the parameter t.
      Parameter:
      t - the distance along the ray.
      Gibt zurück:
      3D point on the ray.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      toString in Klasse Object
